problem id: f951b8a1
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(3)

examples:
  11000111 -> 00000100
  01010001 -> 01001110
  11010000 -> 01011010
  10001100 -> 00100001
  10010011 -> 01011110
  00001001 -> 00100101
  01110101 -> 11011010
  01110000 -> 11001110
  00110001 -> 11000010

query: 00111000
predicted answer: 11100111
